site.title: Design & Digital Services | ION Print & Promo
site.description: Affordable, professional, collaborative graphic design for small businesses across Simcoe County, Muskoka, GTA and beyond. Our ION Print & Promo design team is here for you.

centreText.title: Good Design Makes Your Business Look Its Best
centreText.description: At ION Print & Promo, our in-house designers help local businesses and organizations look professional, without the big-agency price tag. We'll make your brand strong, polished, and built to impress.

features.title: Smart Design for Real-World Use
features.description:
We offer a full suite of graphic design supports for every business and budget. A professional designer helps make sure every piece looks clean, balanced, branded and ready to represent you properly.

Your branding, printed materials and digital presence should reflect your brand, your message and the quality of the work you do.
features.imageAlt: Modern digital printing equipment producing high-quality materials

features.title: Designed Here. Printed Here. Done Right
features.description:
Our in-house graphic designers understand how designs need to be built for printing, signage and promo products.

That means your files are created with the right sizing, spacing, resolution, colours, margins and finishing requirements from the start.

Our expert team works directly with you to make the process clear, efficient and easy. Stop by our Barrie office to see samples of work or chat with one of our graphic designers to get started.
features.imageAlt: Custom printed materials with specialty finishes

features.title: Design Support for Every Stage of Your Business
features.description:
Whether you are launching a new business, refreshing your brand or updating existing materials, we can help bring your ideas to life.

We take the time to understand your business, your goals and your audience so the final product feels like you and not an online template.

You'll be involved from the first concept to the final proof, making sure everything looks great and works just the way you need it to.
features.imageAlt: Custom printed materials with specialty finishes

cta.heading: We're your go-to print shop for custom signs in all sizes & formats!
